scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && cp manifest.json dist/ && mkdir -p dist/sidepanel && cp src/sidepanel/index.html dist/sidepanel/ && esbuild src/sidepanel/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/sidepanel/index.js --target=chrome100 && rm -f dist/sidepanel/ws-client.js dist/sidepanel/update-store.js dist/sidepanel/poll-fallback.js && rm -rf dist/shared
